'''Aavman Extravagance''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer during the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The company produced luxury [[Yacht/Legends|yachts]] including the [[Model 11-S Space Yacht]].

==Sources==
